name: Spectrum Gusto Soup For Cat With Tuna And Pumpkin 50g
shortDescription: Treat your feline friend to a delightful snack experience with SPECTRUM GUSTO Soup for Cats! Appropriate for any Cat/Kitten as a healthy treat but not a substitute for a complete balanced food. Make sufficient drinking water available.
